title: An Act ensuring access to healthcare and medically necessary food for children

abstracts.abstract: The committee on Health Care Financing to whom was referred the Senate Bill ensuring access to healthcare and medically necessary food for children (Senate, No. 691), - reports, recommending that the same ought to pass with an amendment substituting a new draft with the same title (Senate, No. 3069) (estimated cost greater than $100,000).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Health Care Financing
Referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means

related_entities.name: the committee on Senate Ways and Means
committee on Senate Ways and Means

sponsorships.name: Joint Committee on Health Care Financing
